data.name: Femdom hotel
data.detailed_description:
Welcome to Femdom Hotel — a twisted luxury facility where dominant Mistresses rule and male slaves obey.

Step into a dark erotic world where strict Mistresses relentlessly train and humiliate the men who dare enter their domain. Realistic, detailed characters bring each scene to life, whether you're crawling at their feet or enduring their punishments.

Explore the hotel from the ground floor to private upstairs rooms, and surrender yourself fully — in VR or on PC.
BDSM scenes include: spanking, shoe worship, strap-on play, human ashtray, and more.


Highlights:

  • Erotic roleplay with multiple Mistresses

  • Interactive domination scenes and punishments

  • Realistic characters and immersive atmosphere

  • Full PC and VR support

  • Explicit adult content — 18+ only

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5 / AMD Ryzen 5
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 960 / AMD Radeon RX 480
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR or Oculus PC
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7 / AMD Ryzen 7
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 4070 / AMD Radeon RX 7000
  • DirectX: 版本：12
  • 儲存空間: 15 GB 可用空間
  • VR 支援: SteamVR or Oculus PC
